keyEvents.text: Goal! Türkiye 0, Paraguay 1. Matías Galarza (Paraguay) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Julio Enciso.
Matías Galarza (Paraguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Yunus Akgün (Türkiye).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Kerem Aktürkoglu (Türkiye).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match (Türkiye).
Delay in match (Paraguay).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Isidro Pitta (Paraguay).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Miguel Almirón (Paraguay) is shown the red card.
Delay in match because of an injury Gustavo Gómez (Paraguay).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Türkiye 0, Paraguay 1.
Substitution, Paraguay. Damián Bobadilla replaces Isidro Pitta.
Substitution, Türkiye. Baris Alper Yilmaz replaces Kerem Aktürkoglu.
Second Half begins Türkiye 0, Paraguay 1.
Delay in match because of an injury Orlando Gill (Paraguay).
Substitution, Türkiye. Can Uzun replaces Ismail Yüksek.
Substitution, Türkiye. Deniz Gül replaces Yunus Akgün.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Diego Gómez (Paraguay).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Diego Gómez (Paraguay).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Paraguay. Gustavo Velázquez replaces Diego Gómez because of an injury.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Türkiye. Eren Elmali replaces Ferdi Kadioglu.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Eren Elmali (Türkiye) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Paraguay. Alexandro Maidana replaces Juan José Cáceres.
Substitution, Türkiye. Orkun Kökçü replaces Abdülkerim Bardakci.
Delay in match because of an injury Matías Galarza (Paraguay).
Substitution, Paraguay. Gabriel Ávalos replaces Julio Enciso because of an injury.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Paraguay. José Canale replaces Matías Galarza because of an injury.
Second Half ends, Türkiye 0, Paraguay 1.
